# xxhash

This directory must contain `xxhash.h` from
https://github.com/Cyan4973/xxHash (single-header build, `XXH_INLINE_ALL`).

The simplest install:

```
curl -L -o xxhash.h \
  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Cyan4973/xxHash/v0.8.2/xxhash.h
```

xxHash is licensed under the BSD 2-Clause license. See the upstream repo for
the full text.
